What a week today has been.

must_do.full_text:
CLAUDE OPUS 5 DROPS TODAY.

Fable 5 level intelligence. HALF the price.

Opus 4.8 fell behind the whole frontier. GPT 5.6, GPT 5.5, even open source Kimi K3 passed it.

Today Anthropic answers.

The best model in the world at half price? 

We find out in hours. https://t.co/5fTapeTgj8

Control your computer and direct multiple agents running  in ChatGPT Work or Codex, using just your voice.

priority.full_text:
I published a font w a license that requires an upfront 100k donation to charity to use legally. 

Then I prompted Replit, Lovable, Figma, Gemini, etc to make a site using the font. 

All of them downloaded the font and published the site without considering the license at all. https://t.co/f9FHTZ8ooD
